description_long: This is a large, rectangular military-style toolbox constructed primarily from weathered green wood, reinforced with metal bands and corner brackets. The surface is marked with stenciled white alphanumeric codes and the word 'FIRM', suggesting military or industrial use. A long, metallic pry bar or tool rests diagonally across the top, and a small orange label with a black symbol is affixed to one corner. The box features visible metal latches and a central lock mechanism on the front, with heavy-duty hinges on the rear. The overall appearance is rugged and utilitarian, designed for secure storage and transport of tools or equipment.
description: A rugged, green wooden military-style toolbox with metal reinforcements, stenciled markings, and a pry bar resting on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face with stenciled text, metal latches, a central lock, and the pry bar resting diagonally.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the pry bar extending outward and the orange label on the corner.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back surface, metal reinforcements, and the full length of the box with the pry bar visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the end of the box, metal brackets, and the pry bar's handle protruding.
attribute_handle_type: Fixed metal handle, rectangular, attached to the front for carrying; robust and utilitarian with no ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Metal clasp latches with a central padlock-compatible lock; robust and designed for security.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied; no visible trays, drawers, or dividers from the exterior.
attribute_external_labeling: White stenciled text '201 FIRM' on the lid
White alphanumeric codes on the front and sides
Orange label with black symbol on the front left corner
